body.title: BlissIntegrator should inherit IgorBase (D125)
body.result: BlissIntegrator inherits IgorBase + super().__init__(); also fixed pe_close_loop premature-close bug. Commit fe818ed9.
body.description:
Day-close audit 2026-04-23 found wild_igor/igor/cognition/bliss_integrator.py:75 class BlissIntegrator() doesn't inherit IgorBase. D125 says primary classes must. Wire it up.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/bliss_integrator.py.
**Test plan:** audit_runner --drain shows primary-classes-must-inherit-igorbase PASS.
